definitions.gloss: (on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)

standard.text: この言葉の定義は「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」である。
「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という意味で使われることが多い。
(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という概念は重要だ。
その出来事は「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」の良い例だ。
「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という価値観が大切だ。
(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という考え方は昔から存在する。
「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」というのは難しい概念だ。
(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」を理解することは重要である。
「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という側面から見ると異なる。
(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という表現は適切だ。
「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」の意味で使用される。
(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という判断は妥当だ。
「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という概念を日本語で表す。
(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という視点は有効である。
「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」の例は多く見られる。
(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という定義で理解している。
「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という意味が込められている。
(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という考え方に共感する。
「(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」という要素は不可欠だ。
(on a) voluntary basis (as opposed to a legal obligation)」というテーマで議論した。
